description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:buster-slim Docker image. Add a before_script that runs apt-get update, apt-get -y install pandoc r-base, then R -e "install.packages('blogdown', repos='https://cran.rstudio.com/')" and R -e "blogdown::install_hugo()". Define a pages job in the deploy stage that executes R -e "blogdown::build_site()", publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
